title: Lead Investment Banker at KPMG India

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at KPMG India
jsonLd.description:
KPMG India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KPMG India:
KPMG India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India!
